response.global_analysis: The video features Usada Pekora's 6th Anniversary Live, which uses a 3rd Anniversary performance as a themed 'jackpot effect'. I have transcribed the initial song performance, the subsequent talking segment where Pekora explains the Pachislot theme, and the short 'Strike of Fate' jingle. Audio phonetically matches on-screen text and the artist's speech. Reference JSON was used for structural context, but lyrics were transcribed directly as they were missing from the reference.

subtitles.original: 君に...
subtitles.english: To you...

subtitles.original: 会いたいと言いたくて
subtitles.english: I wanted to say I want to see you

subtitles.original: 輝いた季節は
subtitles.english: The season that shined

subtitles.original: 後悔したくないから
subtitles.english: Because I don't want to have any regrets

subtitles.original: 叶わない夢なんて
subtitles.english: A dream that won't come true...

subtitles.original: 簡単に口にはしたくない
subtitles.english: is something I don't want to speak of so easily.

subtitles.original: 諦めた瞬間に
subtitles.english: The moment you give up...

subtitles.original: 自分自身終わらせてるだけ
subtitles.english: you're just ending it yourself.

subtitles.original: もっと単純に感じたい
subtitles.english: I want to feel more simply,

subtitles.original: 君のこといつも
subtitles.english: always about you.

subtitles.original: 素直に笑うよ
subtitles.english: I'll smile honestly,

subtitles.original: 未来へ続いてく
subtitles.english: continuing into the future.

subtitles.original: 君がホントに好きだーって
subtitles.english: That I really love you...

subtitles.original: いつも心に飾ってたい
subtitles.english: I want to keep it in my heart always.

subtitles.original: 楽しさだけが全てなら
subtitles.english: If fun is all that matters...

subtitles.original: 本当の愛じゃないから
subtitles.english: then it isn't real love.

subtitles.original: 君に 会いたいと言いたくて
subtitles.english: I wanted to say I want to see you.

subtitles.original: 二人輝いた季節は
subtitles.english: The season where we both shined...

subtitles.original: きっとこれからも続いてく
subtitles.english: will surely continue from now on.

subtitles.original: だから大切な未来に
subtitles.english: So, towards a precious future...

subtitles.original: この想い残したい
subtitles.english: I want to leave these feelings behind.

subtitles.original: 君に 会いたいと言いたくて
subtitles.english: I wanted to say I want to see you.

subtitles.original: 二人輝いた季節は
subtitles.english: The season where we both shined...

subtitles.original: きっとこれからも続いてく
subtitles.english: will surely continue from now on.

subtitles.original: みんな 6周年ライブに来てくれて アリぺこ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thanks for coming to my 6th anniversary live! Thank you-peko!

subtitles.original: そして 大変お待たせしました
subtitles.english: And, I'm sorry to have kept you waiting so long.

subtitles.original: さー、さー、けどね、みんなに楽しんでもらえるような
subtitles.english: Now, now, but I've made this a live performance

subtitles.original: ライブになってるぺこだから、是非ともお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: that everyone can enjoy, so please definitely look forward to it!

subtitles.original: そして、1曲目は『そこにあなたがいるかもしれない』を歌わせてもらったぺこ
subtitles.english: And for the first song, I sang "There Might Be You."

subtitles.original: ま、っていうことは今回のテーマは、そう！
subtitles.english: Well, that means the theme for this time is, yes!

subtitles.original: パチスロ第2弾！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Pachislot Part 2! Yay!

subtitles.original: 当たり演出もね、めちゃめちゃ色々ありますんで
subtitles.english: There are also so many different jackpot effects,

subtitles.original: 是非とも次の曲は何が来るかなーって考えながら楽しんでもらえたら嬉しいぺこ
subtitles.english: so I'd be happy if you enjoyed it while wondering what the next song will be.

subtitles.original: そして、今回のハッシュタグはこちら！
subtitles.english: And here is this time's hashtag!

subtitles.original: #兎田ぺこら6周年記念LIVE ぺこなので、たくさんポストしてください！
subtitles.english: It's #UsadaPekora6thAnniversaryLIVE, so please post a lot!

subtitles.original: ちゅーわけで、そんじゃ早速回していくかー！よいしょっと
subtitles.english: So then, let's get right into spinning it! Heave-ho.

subtitles.original: あれ？
subtitles.english: Huh?

subtitles.original: お、始まった
subtitles.english: Oh, it started.

subtitles.original: 運命の一撃！
subtitles.english: Strike of Fate!

subtitles.original: 好機 好機 好機！
subtitles.english: Opportunity! Opportunity! Opportunity!

subtitles.original: 笑うべきだと分かった時は、泣くべきじゃねえぺこ！
subtitles.english: When you know it's time to laugh, it's not the time to cry, peko!

subtitles.original: 運命の...
subtitles.english: Strike of...

subtitles.original: 一撃を、叩き込め！
subtitles.english: fate, hammer it in!
